storyInfo: After the Feast of a Hundred Delicacies, strange phenomena manifest around Yan. The True Lung makes an agreement with the Grand Commandant and sets the day of the full moon as the deadline before which Yan will send troops to quell the Sui. Zuo Le leaves the Garden of Grotesqueries, hurrying back to Baizao with a token in hand. At the same time, Ch'en enters a dream woven by the Feranmuts.

attributes.text:
'A Fangshi from afar says there is a great mountain on the northern border called Jing, and atop it sits a mystical stone called Wa.

'Thousands of meters wide and tall, shaped like a jewel, the color of crystal...

'It shines with a brilliant blaze, and a luster that never wanes...'

'It cuts both metal and stone, brings forth all things with methods unknowable, with principles unfathomable...'


'Obtain this miraculous object, and perhaps it will help Yan face the coming calamity.'
'I don't get it, sir. We sacrificed so much for this, yet you intend to hand it over to the House of Yan?'
'That man started the war in the first place, and sent thousands to perish. Why would you aid the despot?'
'We wish to free the masses from suffering, not to aid a single ruler... Fate shall play its hand in time; no one person controls it...'
'I only pray for an early end to the strife, that the people would no longer suffer its torments...'

attributes.content: Ah... yes, yes...!
attributes.name: Elderly Voice

attributes.content: This is...
attributes.name: Elderly Voice

attributes.content: The 'fate' of Great Yan.
attributes.name: Elderly Voice

attributes.content: <p=2>1102 Late autumn</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Yo. Still working?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Madame Oni—I mean, Hoshiguma Sir...
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: Last Mid-Autumn Festival, Downtown was flooded with people watching the festival lanterns. Patrol didn't have enough hands to keep everyone off the roads; it almost got hairy out there.
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: The Commissioner was fuming over it...
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: Oho. Probably shouldn't have done that.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The whole squad got punished for it. Double patrol hours for the month.
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: The Commissioner even told us to be extra careful now, since Chief Wei has been out of town.
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: Sure. Better safe than sorry.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Well, good work, boys. I did just happen to bring in some chow, so share it amongst yourselves.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: We can't possibly take all this...
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: C'mon, listen to your stomach growling. Have a bite.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Wait, what was that—
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: It came out of nowhere. What kind of thunderclap was that?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: Wait, am I seeing things?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: Over there, in the sky... what is that?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer On Duty

attributes.content: Boatman, slow us down. Look over there, do you see something on the river?
attributes.name: Excited Tourist

attributes.content: A beckbeast? But how is it on the river, and it's carrying... a goblet?
attributes.name: Excited Tourist

attributes.content: Just a mirage. What's so special about that, don't you get those in Kou-wu City?
attributes.name: Boatman

attributes.content: (...Break.)
attributes.name: Boatman

attributes.content: Huh, what's with the sudden rain...? Where'd the beckbeast go?
attributes.name: Excited Tourist

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Boatman

attributes.content: Autumn rain this year... may well freeze my bones.
attributes.name: Boatman

attributes.content: Reporting in! Report—
attributes.name: Yanese Soldier

attributes.content: The Feranmut... has reached the final sentry post!
attributes.name: Yanese Soldier

attributes.content: Red alert! Repeat, all units on maximum alert!
attributes.name: Yanese Soldier

attributes.content: Wo kao...
attributes.name: Yanese Soldier

attributes.content: That thing doesn't look like a 'creature' at all... that's a damned mountain...!
attributes.name: Yanese Soldier

attributes.content: Excuse me, sir.
attributes.name: Servant

attributes.content: The Grand Commandant is sick abed, and will not see anyone, so please—
attributes.name: Servant

attributes.content: Is the Grand Commandant in?
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Y-Yes!
attributes.name: Servant

attributes.content: Bring me to him.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: *cough* *cough*... *cough* *cough* *cough*...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: ...In my fevered dreams, it was as if I'd seen the late...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I had thought... you were the late emperor, here to take me away.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I know you often think of the late emperor...
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: But I fear anxiety has addled your brain, if you're thinking about your end already.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Your Imperial Majesty... you honor me with your presence...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Forgive this servant... I've failed to rise for even a salutation...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: How have you deteriorated so greatly, in the few days since our last meeting?
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Are you taking your medicine?
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: I beg Your Majesty's understanding...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: This consumption is a stubborn, chronic illness... The abnormal weather this Mid-Autumn struck with a cold...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I fear this wizened shell may not make it through the winter...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: You are a trusted servant of Great Yan and should not sell yourself short.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: How could the same man, who once kept countless foreign foes halted at our gates, dread a mere cold?
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Be at ease, and convalesce. I await your swift recovery, and for you to share my burdens and aid the nation once you are well.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: *cough* *cough*... This addled servant... is in truth, ill-suited to the task.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Great Yan today is rich with talent. Your Imperial Majesty decides all matters, great and small, so why seek counsel from this withered servant...?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: ...I see.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: So the Grand Commandant is unsatisfied with my arbitrary actions, and wishes to return home due to his illness.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: I... This humble servant would never dare...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: In the last two weeks, ministers across the bureaucracy and all throughout the land have stacked petitions urging war high on my desk.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Every one is passionate, and a few I would venture to call desperate.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: So for the Grand Commandant to claim illness at this hour, is this to compel me to...?
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: *cough* *cough*... Your Majesty is indeed aware...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: All Yanese share a view on this age-old problem...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Your Majesty may not believe me, but ought to have faith in this...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: The will of the people'.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I'll be willing to try any other possible solution, as long as we can avoid spilling the blood of our troops too readily.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: I had thought you would know best my mind on the matter.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Your Majesty is well-versed in our history... *cough*—surely you must know...?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Across the many times the blood that ought be shed... when was it ever avoidable...?
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: One ought to act swiftly when necessary. Indecisive efforts for want of perfection will only lead to more bloodshed.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I had thought... Your Majesty understood this long ago...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: It has been more than two weeks since the great offender entered the Tomb of Sui, but his fate remains unknown.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: All Great Yan is in an uproar, not only due to the five Feranmuts, but the presence of foreign foes as well...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Leave him in the Tomb for even one more day, and the danger to Great Yan will increase tenfold.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: This is not my opinion alone...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Even if I could temporarily suppress public sentiments for Your Majesty's sake... it would be no true solution...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: So, how do you want to go about it?
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: I cannot ask Your Majesty to rescind an imperial edict...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: I can only make an earnest request... to set a day.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: ...A final deadline until which Great Yan must hold.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Whether or not blood should have ever been shed will be determined thousands of years from now by historians and common folk alike.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: But for now, I am afraid neither the Grand Commandant, nor I, will get to make that determination.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Is it Great Yan that cannot hold, or the collective lust for glory?
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: ...Your Imperial Majesty...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: But your request is not without merit.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: I recall, it was the day after the full moon when he went in...
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: The next day of the full moon it is.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: If the man fails to achieve anything in the Tomb of Sui, then we will proceed as the Grand Commandant proposes.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Your Imperial Majesty... is wise and just...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: Let it be so.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: A cold is no grave illness, Grand Commandant, but convalescence is still important.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: I hear Danyan's snow pears are a great expectorant. I'll send for some.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: Finish the pears before you rest for the night, and your illness should be cured in the morning.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: I will hold court early tomorrow. Do not be late.
attributes.name: Shadowy Figure

attributes.content: <p=2>Three days before the day of the full moon</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Are we... outside?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Those Feranmut proxies... have quite the mystical prowess.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Is the Placation finally complete?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Perhaps...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: No... just how many times have we tried? Is that complete?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: How long have we spent in the Garden of Grotesqueries?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Based on the dates on the Tianshi Bureau's terminal... it's been more than two weeks since we entered the Garden.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: More than half a month? Why do I feel as if we've spent even longer than that...?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: We don't know if anything's happened in the Tomb of Sui since we've been here...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Zuo, you asked 'how many times'...?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I'm getting the sense this isn't our first time standing on this spot.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Concluding the Placation, taking the jade rule, leaving the Garden, and going back to town... I feel like we've done it all multiple times, and also...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Sometimes it's Mr. Yi who greets us, while other times the weiqi player blocks our path.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Sometimes the bestial Hou turns into a butterfly and gravely injures the bestial Sui... but other times we fall into a geist trap and get chased out of the Garden for no apparent reason.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: And this hunch isn't a recent realization?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: It was a faint feeling at first, but it was only just now that I suddenly realized we seem to have been repeating our Garden visits.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: If that is the case, maybe the Placation is finally complete?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: ...I certainly hope that's the case.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Right, who has the token? It seems Mr. Yi hands the rule to a different person each time we complete the rite...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I don't have it.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Neither do I.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Then—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: A small object falls from Zuo Le's pocket.
To everyone's surprise, it is no jade rule, but a tiny 'doll'.
What...?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Auntie Lin, Yun... Have we seen this before?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Yo, so you made it out alive. Pretty tough, huh?
Zushi!
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Zu... Zushi.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Why are you calling me that when you're not even a Tianshi disciple, kiddo?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Um, how should I address you then...?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Who cares about titles? Your qinggong's good and you move quick, so just get to wherever you need to be.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Where do I need to be...?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: What should a Candleholder do after getting the token from the Garden?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Return to the Sui Regulator and submit the jade rule along with a report.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Then begone! No more dawdling!
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: But the jade rule—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: A token's a token. Maybe there's a reason you didn't get the jade rule this time, but just hurry back to the Sui Regulator already. Or are you scared that proxy's gonna report you for theft?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Qianbei, there's something I'd like to ask about Baizao—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Just be quick. Who's the Candleholder here, you or me?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Won't you know the answer once you see the city yourself anyway?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Act your age. I'm sure you know how to adapt to a situation, don't you?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I'll go with Zuo Le.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: You stay.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Zushi...?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Baizao doesn't have much use for a judiciary at the moment, so it'd be a pointless trip for you. You'll be more useful here.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Same goes for the Yun kid. Neither of you is a member of Sui Regulator, so stay. You'll make less trouble for all of us.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: The three exchange glances, and silently agree to the Tianshi's directive.
Zuo Le puts the token back into his pocket, and after bidding farewell to the party, leaps off northward.
Old... Qianbei, there's something I want to ask...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Where is the young lady who claimed to be of the Shanhaizhong, the one you took away before we entered the Tomb?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Oh? I didn't think a dimwit like you would concern yourself with that lass.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: I just remembered, she mentioned there was something from the Garden that could keep Yan and the bestial Sui from coming to blows.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: You granted us permission to enter the Garden, but you didn't examine the token Zuo Le had at all.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Does that mean... you believe she spoke the truth?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: How intriguing... Smarty pants like you are so different from the martial types.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Of course, I believe you have your reasons for sending him alone, but I'm worried Zuo Le might come to harm if the token is truly important.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Hmph, to speak of safety... no one's truly safe right now.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: If that kid really has what it takes to be a Candleholder, now's the time to show it.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: What's wrong? I rarely ever see you so down.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: I just worry they might not manage to deliver that token.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Those who know what the token truly is can only stand and watch, while those helping us don't even know where it should go.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: That Old Tianshi has already done us a grand favor. The rest is up to the family's fate.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: I didn't think those youths would get involved in this, and I'm not sure whether to be relieved or worried.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Many have come to this garden over the past century.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: But this group of youngsters was the first to retrieve that glimmer of hope from our memories left behind and bring it back to this realm.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: No matter what, we must believe that their fates are somewhat linked to ours.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: You speak sense, sir.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Well, myriad sights abound in the land, but encounters are still up to fate.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: You could buy a ticket early, do your research, memorize the map, stand outside the garden until it opens... but then a storm comes, and you see nothing at all.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: Or you could enter through a random side gate and roam around aimlessly, but as long as you have a goal in mind, you might be pleasantly surprised by what you find.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: Visitors come with interest, but it always wanes with time... It's not proper to force this enthusiasm to endure.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: So let's just relax and wait here, and protect this garden...
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: This beautiful place is honestly quite difficult to abandon.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: What a bother. I'm getting a sore throat repeating the same argument over and over.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: We're back to square one, no? Thousands of years we've debated, and it seems nothing's getting through that thick head of yours.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: You're the stubborn one. Whatever scholarly talents you have are negated by your expertise in nonsensical argumentation.
attributes.name: Sullen Voice

attributes.content: The truth is simple—there is no order without rules. To live in this realm, one must be able to tell right from wrong.
attributes.name: Sullen Voice

attributes.content: If it really is as you say, for everyone to blur boundaries and confuse right and wrong, what sort of chaos will befall this realm?
attributes.name: Sullen Voice

attributes.content: Preposterous... Your insistence on adherence to rules is nothing more than locking yourself in a prison of your own making.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Let me ask you then. To build a room, a house, a city, a moat—there are rules to follow, yes.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: But when we measure merits and errors made in history, or the hearts of the masses—what rules or metrics are we to abide by?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Of course, rules are made to fit the situation, and for mortal benefit.
attributes.name: Sullen Voice

attributes.content: When have I ever said rules should be set for the sake of having them?
attributes.name: Sullen Voice

attributes.content: Where... are we?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: ...And who are you?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Fine, fine... then let me ask you this.
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: You say we must have rules, but then who should set them in the first place?
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: The virtuous, of course—only they can convince the masses, and rules can only stand when accepted by all.
attributes.name: Peculiar-looking Artisan

attributes.content: Don't you see the problem with that?
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: We have to first find virtuous people to set rules, but what deems one virtuous? Doesn't it mean we have to lay down some rules to find these people?
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: Ju, the ten thousand years of your life have been a waste, if you can't even decide if the fowlbeast or egg came first.
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: Hah! You're just unreasonably putting the cart before the burdenbeast to suit your fallacy.
attributes.name: Peculiar-looking Artisan

attributes.content: We already have rules called 'righteousness'. You think they just appeared from thin air?
attributes.name: Peculiar-looking Artisan

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What are you talking about...?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Oh, look. This one's about to wake up too.
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: Awake? Or dreaming?
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: Do you even have to ask? Just look at her, all lost. Obviously, she's dreaming.
attributes.name: Peculiar-looking Artisan

attributes.content: Awake in a dream, yet not truly woken. The girl is suffering from a headache over the dilemma she faces.
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: If you're stubborn and refuse to see sense, you'll surely run up against barriers, both physical and mental.
attributes.name: Peculiar-looking Artisan

attributes.content: You're right about that... her knowing and doing don't match. She's contradicting herself—wants non-action, yet also wants to act.
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: Now, she seeks a tangible form of 'justice', and even wants to pocket it and take it away. I think she's far more obsessed than that good-for-nothing disciple of mine.
attributes.name: Peculiar-looking Artisan

attributes.content: Yes, how could she enjoy such a delusional dream if she weren't the most obsessed person walking this realm?
attributes.name: Peculiar-looking Artisan

attributes.content: No need to be so harsh, Ju. Plenty of people out there climb trees to catch fins or strike ice to make fire. What can we even do?
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: But you're right about one thing...
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: Is this girl an obsessed one, or what...?
attributes.name: Plain-Dressed Elder

attributes.content: Who—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What's the matter with you?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Nothing...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Did you not hear any of that?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You're so weird. You've been staring into blank space for a while now.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Did those geists give you a concussion? Don't suppose there's anything I can do about that.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Thanks. I'm not quite—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I just feel like...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I've been here before...
attributes.name: Ch'en
